name: Week 6 Push (Chest/Shoulders/Triceps)
description: Shuffle order is permanent now — push press stays first. W5 proved 50/side x8 is real. This week: lock in 3x8 at 50. Chest press moves up (after lat raises, before incline) so it's less gassed. Pec deck targets 120.

exercises.notes: 50/side. W5: 8/8/7. Goal: 3x8 clean. If all three hit 8, try 55/side on a bonus set. Dip small, drive big, full lockout.
20lb. W5: 3x15 doable. If 20s are clean for all 3 sets, try 25 on the last set. Watch right shoulder.
W5: died at 140 when last. Now it's station 2 — should be fresher. Start at 160, work up. If 160x8 is clean, try 170. Goal: find the honest number in this slot.
55lb. W5: 10/8/8/10. Goal: 4x10 clean. If all hit 10, try 60 next week.
W5: 115x12 clean all 3 sets. Bump to 120. If 120x10 is clean, you've earned it.
55. W5: 55x12 all sets. Solid. Try 60 on last set if form is holding. Right side still the weak link.
65. W5: 12/12/10. Goal: 3x12 at 65. If all hit 12, bump to 70 on last set. Hands apart.
110. W5: 12/12/9. Goal: 3x12 clean. If all hit 12, try 115. This is a real exercise now, not just a spontaneous add-on.

tips: Push press first — locked in permanently. 50/side x3x8 is the target.
Chest press moved to station 2 (after overhead + lat raises). Should be ~160-170 range here vs 140 when last.
Pec deck 120: you went 85 → 105 → 115 → now 120 in 6 weeks. Respect the progression.
Right shoulder: if the twinge flares during push press lockout, drop to 45 immediately. Don't push through shoulder pain overhead.
Rest 2 min between push press, 2.5 min on chest press, 75s on cables
